questions.question: Compare and contrast Traditional Business Intelligence (BI) and Big Data. How do they differ in terms of data processing, storage, and analysis?
questions.hint: Explain the differences in at least 2 aspects.

questions.question: What are the key characteristics that distinguish Big Data from Traditional Business Intelligence? Provide at least two specific examples.
questions.hint: Focus on the key differences in data volume, velocity, and variety.

questions.question: Explain the concept of Big Data and its evolution over time. How does Big Data differ from Traditional Business Intelligence in this regard?
questions.hint: Discuss the technological advancements that have enabled the growth of Big Data.
